mapper.sql: select favorite_id, user_id, goods_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, remark from tr_trade_favorite
mapper.insert:
insert into tr_trade_favorite
user_id, goods_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, remark,
#{userId}, #{goodsId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{remark},
mapper.update: update tr_trade_favorite set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where favorite_id = #{favoriteId}

update tr_trade_favorite set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where favorite_id in
#{favoriteId}
update tr_trade_favorite set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and goods_id = #{goodsId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select count(1) from tr_trade_favorite where user_id = #{userId} and goods_id = #{goodsId} and del_flag = '0'

select g.goods_id as goodsId, g.seller_id as sellerId, g.category_id as categoryId, g.title as title, g.price as price, g.original_price as originalPrice, g.quality as quality, g.description as description, g.trade_place as tradePlace, g.goods_status as goodsStatus, g.view_count as viewCount, g.favorite_count as favoriteCount, g.create_time as createTime, g.update_time as updateTime, c.category_name as categoryName, s.nickname as sellerNickname, s.avatar as sellerAvatar, (select group_concat(i.image_url order by i.sort asc, i.image_id asc) from tr_trade_goods_image i where i.goods_id = g.goods_id and i.del_flag = '0') as imageUrls from tr_trade_favorite f inner join tr_trade_goods g on g.goods_id = f.goods_id and g.del_flag = '0' left join tr_trade_category c on c.category_id = g.category_id left join tr_student_user s on s.user_id = g.seller_id where f.user_id = #{userId} and f.del_flag = '0' order by f.update_time desc, f.favorite_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into tr_trade_favorite (user_id, goods_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values (#{userId}, #{goodsId}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{createBy}, sysdate(), '0') on duplicate key update del_flag = '0', update_by = #{createBy}, update_time = sysdate()
